storage_extensions.usage: mmap the five hash-index arrays; probe (num.adsh, num.tag, num.version, eq_code) with open addressing and read counts[slot] as pre_count, replacing the binary-search plus contiguous-run scan on pre/indexes/adsh_tag_version.rowids.bin

join_order.notes: Keep adsh_to_rowid as the first cheap filter on the sequential num scan.

join_order.build: pre(pre.adsh_tag_version_stmt.count_hash, filtered by stmt = 'EQ' in the probe key)
join_order.notes: Probe the persistent composite hash index on (adsh,tag,version,stmt) and use the stored count directly; do not binary-search pre/indexes/adsh_tag_version.rowids.bin in the hot loop.
Retain the existing deferred tag lookup so tlabel is fetched only for rows that survived sub and pre.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(sub/indexes/adsh_to_rowid.bin) with row-level reads of sub.sic and sub.cik
data_structures.fact_join: persistent compact_hash_map(pre.adsh_tag_version_stmt.count_hash) for (adsh,tag,version,stmt)->count, plus pre-built tag_version_hash for (tag,version) lookup
data_structures.aggregation: scan-time radix/hash partition buffers on final group_key=(sic,tlabel) carrying {group_key,cik,scaled_value,pre_count}; then per-partition compact_hash_map for sums/counts plus per-partition distinct_pair_set(group_key,cik)

indexes.purpose: skip num blocks whose uom range cannot contain usd_code
direct adsh lookup before sic and cik reads
replace pre sorted-index binary search and run scan with a single direct count lookup for stmt='EQ'
lookup tag rowid and tlabel after sub and pre have already filtered the probe stream

optimization_notes: Root cause: the remaining 81.17 ms hot phase is a storage-level mismatch in the pre join path, because probing pre through a sorted rowid permutation requires an O(log N) binary search plus a run scan over a nearly unique 9.23M-key space inside the main num scan, creating cache-miss-heavy random access that dominates runtime. Strategy category E: build and use a persistent composite hash index on pre(adsh,tag,version,stmt) that stores the exact multiplicity for each key, keep the proven sub->pre->tag join order and existing partitioned aggregation, and replace the hot-loop pre probe with one direct hash lookup that returns pre_count immediately.
